---
title: 'Tutorials'
description: "Step-by-step tutorials for building ML pipelines, AI integrations, and analytics workflows with Xorq"
---

Hands-on tutorials that walk you through specific tasks from start to finish. Each tutorial builds working code you can run immediately.

## Explore the tutorials

::: {.docs-grid}
::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-cpu"></i>

[**ML tutorials**](ml_tutorials/split_data_for_training.qmd)

Split data for training, train and evaluate models, and deploy your first pipeline
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-stars"></i>

[**AI tutorials**](ai_tutorials/your_first_udxf.qmd)

Build UDXFs, call LLMs from expressions, create MCP tools, and work with Arrow Flight
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-bar-chart"></i>

[**Analytics tutorials**](analytics_tutorials/create_your_first_udf.qmd)

Create custom UDFs, work with schemas, and extend SQL with Python logic
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-layers"></i>

[**Core tutorials**](core_tutorials/understand_deferred_execution.qmd)

Understand deferred execution, explore caching, switch backends, and build your first artifact
:::
:::
